execution_policy.funding_convention: funding event allocated to the one-hour interval ending at funding_time_utc; short perp cashflow equals funding_rate
execution_policy.portfolio_weighting: equal-weight across available BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, SOLUSDT symbol intervals
execution_policy.position: long spot 1 notional and short perp 1 notional per symbol
execution_policy.return_convention: hourly open-to-open using spot open and USD-M perp panel open

risk_limitations: Exchange, custody, margin transfer, borrow, tax, and operational risks are not modeled.
No leverage or liquidation model is applied.
Spot/perp execution quality, fees, VIP tiers, slippage, and borrow constraints are simplified fixed-cost diagnostics.
Funding cashflow uses reviewed Binance USD-M funding events only and does not imply future funding availability.
This is a historical diagnostic, not a candidate, edge claim, family release, or runtime/live/capital permission.

route_definition.strategy: continuously hold long Binance spot and short Binance USD-M perpetual equal notional
